description: Event-sourcing fixture: a level-1 Rogue takes the Superstitious drawback for +2 AP, then buys it off later (3x cost = 6 AP) after an award. Exercises rebuildStateFromEvents' activeEvents()/boughtOff handling — the drawback must be fully absent from the folded build and its AP refund line gone from compute(), regardless of event order.

events.label: Award — Cleared the goblin camp (20 AP)
